footer.tagline: The home of mutual aid. A network of living homes where collectives welcome each other.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Casa Minga — The house of the commons. Made with care for collectives who share.

home.heroSubtitle: Casa Minga is a home, apartment and room exchange platform between collective living places: participatory housing, ecovillages, shared houses and coliving spaces.
home.availableStaysSub: Hosts opening their home or room inside collective places
home.noStays: No place available to swap yet. Be the first to offer yours!
home.discoverPlacesSub: Participatory housing, ecovillages, shared houses: explore the network.
home.howItWorksSub: Four simple steps to swap your place and travel differently.
home.finalCtaTitle: Ready to swap your place and travel differently?
home.finalCtaText: Create your profile, share your home or room, and access a network of collective places across France and beyond.
home.step1Title: Create your profile and your place
home.step1Body: Introduce yourself, your collective and your daily life. It's free and only takes a few minutes.
home.step2Title: Offer your home, apartment or room
home.step2Body: Add photos, describe your space and share your availability.
home.step3Body: Browse participatory housing, ecovillages and shared houses in the network.
home.step4Body: Agree on the exchange directly with your hosts. No commission, no per-night payment.
home.pillar1Body: You're welcomed by people, not a service. Real homes, lived-in, loved, shared.
home.pillar2Body: Discover collective living places, their values, their daily life. Travel by really meeting people.
home.pillar3Body: Verified profiles, reciprocal exchanges, committed places. The joy of finding your home well cared for.
home.economicP1: On Casa Minga, you never pay per night. No commission is taken on your exchanges. The model is simply based on a clear, transparent annual membership.
home.economicP2: And until June 2026, using the platform is entirely free: create your profile, swap your place, travel at no cost.
home.storyP1Part1: Imagine leaving for a weekend, two weeks or a whole month, simply by swapping your
home.storyP2: No impersonal booking. No prices that keep climbing. Just people opening their doors to each other, in places chosen for their values.
home.storyP3: It's more human, more authentic, more free. And it truly changes the way you travel.
home.storyQuote: "We don't rent a place. We swap one home for another."
home.testimonialsSub: The first exchanges between collective living places.

createPlace.photosHint: The first photo will be used as cover. Show common spaces, gardens, the atmosphere.

howItWorks.heroSubtitle: Casa Minga lets you discover participatory habitats, offer a stay in a collective living place, and travel differently.
howItWorks.stepsSub: Four simple steps to join the network.
howItWorks.step1Title: Create your profile and your place
howItWorks.step1Body: Add your profile, present your participatory habitat, your co-living or your collective place.
howItWorks.step2Body: Add a description, photos, the values of the place, its atmosphere and hosting possibilities.
howItWorks.step3Title: Publish your stays or explore places
howItWorks.step3Body: Offer a room, a home or an immersive stay, or discover places already on Casa Minga.
howItWorks.step4Body: Send a request, chat with the place or host, and organize a stay at the heart of a collective.
howItWorks.freeBody: Casa Minga is currently free to allow the first places and members to join the network, create their listing and start offering stays.
howItWorks.modelBody: Starting June 2026, Casa Minga will run on an annual membership allowing you to publish, receive requests and participate fully in the network — simply, with no per-night fees or per-stay commission.
howItWorks.stayTypesTitle: What kind of stay can you offer?
howItWorks.stayTypesSub: Four formats, depending on your place and your desire.
howItWorks.stay1Body: In a collective place, a room with an engaged host.
howItWorks.stay2Body: An independent home within a participatory habitat.
howItWorks.stay3Body: Take part in the life of the collective for a few days.
howItWorks.stay4Body: A collective member opens their door to you for a brief visit.
howItWorks.why1Body: Ecology, sharing, simplicity… Each place carries a life project.
howItWorks.why2Body: No commission, no market logic. Just genuine connection.
howItWorks.why3Body: Each listing matches an existing place, verified and inhabited.
